entries.round: task:Update 'spec.md' and 'tasks.md' to reflect the architectural decision to host on a VPS instead of Vercel. 1. In 'spec.md', detail the new local file upload strategy (saving to 'public/uploads') and remove references to Vercel Blob/S3. Update the Hosting section to 'VPS (Ubuntu/Node.js)'. 2. In 'tasks.md', check off the image upload task in Phase 4, but rewrite it to reflect local uploads. Add a task for configuring PM2 or PM2/Docker for production deployment on VPS. MUST use <write_file> tags.
